attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  A.SALES_ORDER_KEY   
             ,A.PRODUCT_KEY 
			 ,A.AR_TRX_KEY    
			 ,A.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  
			 ,A.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY   
			 ,A.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY    
			 ,A.END_CUSTOMER_KEY          
			 ,A.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
			 ,A.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
			 ,A.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY     
			 ,A.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG     
			 ,A.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG    
			 ,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_PTR_STE_PRTY_KEY 
			 ,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHANNEL_BKGS_FLG 
			 ,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHNL_DRP_SHP_FLG 
			 ,A.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG 
			 ,A.SALES_REP_NUM         
			 ,A.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT   
			 , A.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD   
			 ,A.SALES_CHANNEL_CD    
			 , A.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD   
			 ,A.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CD   
			 , A.ADJUSTMENT_CD      
			 ,A.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  
			 ,A.ACQUISITION_FLG      
			 ,A.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG   
			 ,A.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG    
			 ,A.OVERLAY_FLG      
			 ,A.IC_REVENUE_FLG    
			,A.CHARGES_FLG   
			,A.SALESREP_FLG        
			,A.MISC_FLG      
			,A.SERVICE_FLG      
			,A.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG   
			,A.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG      
			,A.REVENUE_FLG    
			,A.RMA_FLG             
			,A.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT  
			,A.CONVERSION_RT  
			,NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME AS DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM   
			,A.CONVERSION_DT      
            ,A.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM        
			,A.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT    
			,A.DD_BK_SO_NUM_INT  
			,A.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  
			,A.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY      
			, A.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD     
			,A.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE   
			, A.TRADE_IN_AMT            
			,A.COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT   
			, A.COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT    
			,A.COMP_US_COST_AMT    
			, A.EXTENDED_QTY          
			,A.COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT  
			,A.COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT  
			,A.COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT    
			, A.EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY         
			,A.COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT   
			,COALESCE( NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME) DV_BOOKED_DTM    
			,CAST(COALESCE( NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME) AS DATE) DV_BOOKED_DT        
			,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS ORACLE_BOOKED_DTM     
			,CAST(NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS DATE) AS ORACLE_BOOKED_DT 
			,A.CANCEL_CD
			 ,A.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG /* ADDED PART OF TRUE DEMAND */
			,A.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG   /* ADDED PART OF TRUE DEMAND */
			,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
			,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER 
			, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM                                      ,
            USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER        /* CHG0448622 Adding WHO col updates*/    
			,A.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD    /*Added as part of Offer Attribution*/  
			, A.DV_PRODUCT_KEY   /*Added as part of Offer Attribution*/
			,A.DV_FMV_FLG       
			,A.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY /*FMV Q2FY15*/
			, A.CALENDAR_YEAR_MONTH_INT /* Added as part of  Q4FY15 ICPM */
			,A.DSV_FLG, 
			A.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD   , /*PNEELRAJ ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/ 
			A.DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_RTM_CD    	,   /*PNEELRAJ ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/ 
			  A.DV_DEAL_ID   /*as part SOT June CDR */
/* Added as part of Q3FY17 RO */
			,A.XCAT_FLG ,
            A.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME 
			,A.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG  
			,A.ELA_FLG 
/* End Q3FY17 RO */
			,A.DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT  /*Q1FY18 PA*/
			, A.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD /*Q1FY18 RO*/
			,A.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
			,A.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
			, A.POB_TYPE_CD 
			,A.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG 
			,A.SALES_MOTION_CD 
			,A.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG 
			, A.DV_DBT_TYP 
			,A.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD 
			,A.ACQUISITION_ROLE 
			,'I' ACTION_CODE      
			,'I' DML_TYPE 
			,a.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE  AS SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE  
			, A.BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE 
			,A.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
/*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
			,A.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT 
            ,A.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 EA Vnext */
			,A.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_DESCRIPTION /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY24 AUG REL*/
			,A.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
			,A.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
/*			,A.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME*/
    FROM           $$STGDB.WI1_BKGS_MEASURE_ORDER_MTH  A 
    INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV  NSO  
        ON  A.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY /*performance recommendations Oct1st,2021 removed union all*/

SELECT
A.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,A.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,A.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,A.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,A.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,A.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,A.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,A.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY           
,A.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,A.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY        
,A.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          
,A.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG         
,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_PTR_STE_PRTY_KEY
,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHANNEL_BKGS_FLG
,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHNL_DRP_SHP_FLG
,A.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
,A.SALES_REP_NUM                 
,A.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
,A.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            
,A.SALES_CHANNEL_CD              
,A.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD          
,A.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CD             
,A.ADJUSTMENT_CD                 
,A.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD    
,A.ACQUISITION_FLG               
,A.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG        
,A.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        
,A.OVERLAY_FLG                   
,A.IC_REVENUE_FLG                
,A.CHARGES_FLG                   
,A.SALESREP_FLG                  
,A.MISC_FLG                      
,A.SERVICE_FLG                   
,A.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG        
,A.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG          
,A.REVENUE_FLG                   
,A.RMA_FLG                       
,A.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT        
,A.CONVERSION_RT       
,NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME AS DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM          
,A.CONVERSION_DT                 
,A.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM           
,A.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,A.DD_BK_SO_NUM_INT              
,A.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  
,A.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY          
,A.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            
,A.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE           
,A.TRADE_IN_AMT                  
,A.COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT         
,A.COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT        
,A.COMP_US_COST_AMT              
,A.EXTENDED_QTY                  
,A.COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT    
,A.COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT   
,A.COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT         
,A.EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY             
,A.COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT   
,COALESCE( NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME) DV_BOOKED_DTM                
,CAST(COALESCE( NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME) AS DATE) DV_BOOKED_DT                 
,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS ORACLE_BOOKED_DTM            
,CAST(NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS DATE) AS ORACLE_BOOKED_DT   
,A.CANCEL_CD
,A.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG /* ADDED PART OF TRUE DEMAND */
,A.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  /* ADDED PART OF TRUE DEMAND */
/*,A.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,A.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,A.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,A.EDW_UPDATE_USER  */ 
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER  
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM                                     
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER  /* CHG0448622 Adding WHO col updates*/                
,A.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /*Added as part of Offer Attribution*/              
,A.DV_PRODUCT_KEY /*Added as part of Offer Attribution*/
,A.DV_FMV_FLG
,A.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY/*FMV Q2FY15*/
,A.CALENDAR_YEAR_MONTH_INT /* Added as part of  Q4FY15 ICPM */
,A.DSV_FLG,
A.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD         , /* PNEELRAJ ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
A.DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_RTM_CD    ,     /*PNEELRAJ ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/ 
A.DV_DEAL_ID /*as part SOT June CDR */
/* Added as part of Q3FY17 RO */
,A.XCAT_FLG
,A.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
,A.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG 
,A.ELA_FLG
/* End Q3FY17 RO */
,A.DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT /*Q1FY18 PA*/
,A.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
,A.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
,A.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */ 
,A.POB_TYPE_CD
,A.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,A.SALES_MOTION_CD
,A.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG
,A.DV_DBT_TYP
,A.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,A.ACQUISITION_ROLE
,'I' ACTION_CODE                   
,'I' DML_TYPE,
a.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE AS SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE   
,A.BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE
,A.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
/*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
,A.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT
,A.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_DESCRIPTION /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY24 AUG REL*/
FROM       
$$STGDB.WI1_BKGS_MEASURE_ORDER_MTH  A
INNER JOIN 
$$ETLVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV  NSO 
ON 
A.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  IN (-9999,-8888)

UNION ALL

SELECT
A.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,A.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,A.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,A.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,A.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,A.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,A.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,A.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY           
,A.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,A.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY        
,A.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          
,A.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG         
,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_PTR_STE_PRTY_KEY
,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHANNEL_BKGS_FLG
,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHNL_DRP_SHP_FLG
,A.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
,A.SALES_REP_NUM                 
,A.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
,A.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            
,A.SALES_CHANNEL_CD              
,A.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD          
,A.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CD             
,A.ADJUSTMENT_CD                 
,A.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD    
,A.ACQUISITION_FLG               
,A.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG        
,A.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        
,A.OVERLAY_FLG                   
,A.IC_REVENUE_FLG                
,A.CHARGES_FLG                   
,A.SALESREP_FLG                  
,A.MISC_FLG                      
,A.SERVICE_FLG                   
,A.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG        
,A.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG          
,A.REVENUE_FLG                   
,A.RMA_FLG                       
,A.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT        
,A.CONVERSION_RT       
,NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME AS DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM          
,A.CONVERSION_DT                 
,A.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM           
,A.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,A.DD_BK_SO_NUM_INT              
,A.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  
,A.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY          
,A.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            
,A.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE           
,A.TRADE_IN_AMT                  
,A.COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT         
,A.COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT        
,A.COMP_US_COST_AMT              
,A.EXTENDED_QTY                  
,A.COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT    
,A.COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT   
,A.COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT         
,A.EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY             
,A.COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT   
,COALESCE( NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME) DV_BOOKED_DTM                
,CAST(COALESCE( NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME) AS DATE) DV_BOOKED_DT                 
,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS ORACLE_BOOKED_DTM            
,CAST(NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS DATE) AS ORACLE_BOOKED_DT   
,A.CANCEL_CD
,A.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG /* ADDED PART OF TRUE DEMAND */
,A.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  /* ADDED PART OF TRUE DEMAND */
/*,A.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,A.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,A.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,A.EDW_UPDATE_USER  */  
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER  
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM                                     
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER  /* CHG0448622 Adding WHO col updates*/               
,A.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /*Added as part of Offer Attribution*/              
,A.DV_PRODUCT_KEY /*Added as part of Offer Attribution*/ 
,A.DV_FMV_FLG           
,A.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY/*FMV Q2FY15*/
,A.CALENDAR_YEAR_MONTH_INT/* Added as part of  Q4FY15 ICPM */
,A.DSV_FLG,
A.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD         , /* PNEELRAJ ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
A.DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_RTM_CD       ,  /*PNEELRAJ ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/ 
A.DV_DEAL_ID /*as part SOT June CDR */
/* Added as part of Q3FY17 RO */
,A.XCAT_FLG
,A.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
,A.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG 
,A.ELA_FLG
/* End Q3FY17 RO */
,A.DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT /*Q1FY18 PA*/
,A.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD/*Q1FY18 RO*/
,A.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
,A.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
,A.POB_TYPE_CD
,A.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,A.SALES_MOTION_CD
,A.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG
,A.DV_DBT_TYP
,A.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,A.ACQUISITION_ROLE
,'I' ACTION_CODE                   
,'I' DML_TYPE
,a.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE  AS SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE   
,A.BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE
,A.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
/*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
,A.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT
,A.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 EA Vnext */
,A.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_DESCRIPTION /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY24 AUG REL*/
,A.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,A.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
/*,A.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME*/
FROM       
$$STGDB.WI1_BKGS_MEASURE_ORDER_MTH  A
INNER JOIN 
$$ETLVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV  NSO 
ON 
A.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  NOT IN (-9999,-8888)
